amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 60 — paragraph 2
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 60 — paragraph 2

## Text proposed by the Commission

2. The data listed in Annex VIII shall be entered into the EU database by the providers. The Commission shall provide them with technical and administrative support.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2. The data listed in Annex VIII , Section A, shall be entered into the EU database by the providers.
commission_text: 2. The data listed in Annex VIII shall be entered into the EU database by the providers. The Commission shall provide them with technical and administrative support.
parliament_text: 2. The data listed in Annex VIII , Section A, shall be entered into the EU database by the providers.
